---
title: "Diagram 6: Agent interaction models — Pi-mono vs ChatGPT"
date: "2026-03-15"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

## Diagram 6: Agent interaction models

Comparison of two agent communication paradigms: proactive sync (Pi-mono) vs. request/response (ChatGPT).

### Pi-mono: event-driven proactive model

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    agent_p["Agent"]
    human_p["Human"]
    signal{Signal}

    agent_p <--> |A/Sync| human_p
    human_p --> |proactive| agent_p
    signal -- event --> agent_p
```

### ChatGPT: request/response model

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    human_c["Human"]
    agent_c["Agent"]

    human_c -- send --> agent_c
    agent_c -- response --> human_c
```

::: {.callout-caution title="Skill uncertainty notes" collapse="true"}
- "Pi-mono" — column label; may be a product name or abbreviation ("Pimono"?)
- Signal diamond below left Agent — interpreted as an event source that triggers the agent
:::
